name: @intentsolutionsio/promptbook
description: Opt-in Claude Code analytics. After setup consent, Promptbook sends session metrics to promptbook.gg and publishes shareable build cards.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install promptbook\\n  or /plugin install promptbook@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
